'''Kymn''' was a member of [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] in [[24 ABY/Legends|24 ABY]].

==Biography==
Kymn was planted by [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] as a sleeper agent in the [[Spice/Legends|spice]] mines of [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]]. Eventually, he became [[Second Administrator]] of the [[Mining/Legends|mining]] operations, under the [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Chief Administrator/Legends|Chief Administrator]] [[Nien Nunb/Legends|Nien Nunb]]. As part of the crime syndicate's plot for galactic domination, Black Sun took over the spice mines during a [[Battle of Kessel (Black Sun Insurgency)|revolt]].

Following the revolt, the Black Sun leader [[Czethros]] himself arrived and attempted to transmit a coded signal that would activate the Black Sun cells that had been planted in countless key positions in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] government. However, the transmitter was destroyed by [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] apprentices [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] and [[Lowbacca]] before it could send its signal. The Jedi also freed the prisoners in the spice mines that had been imprisoned by the Black Sun mercenaries.

During the fighting, Kymn and his henchmen were lured into a deep section of the mines and then sealed behind heavy [[Plasteel/Legends|plasteel]] barricades, trapping them.
